ddls:
CREATE TABLE "matches" (
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match */,
  "division_id" INTEGER /* ID of the division in which the match was played */,
  "match_date" TEXT /* Date of the match */,
  "home_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the home team */,
  "away_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the away team */,
  "final_home_goals" INTEGER /* Number of goals scored by the home team in the final result */,
  "final_away_goals" INTEGER /* Number of goals scored by the away team in the final result */,
  "full_time_result" TEXT /* Full-time result (H for home win, A for away win, D for draw) */,
  "half_time_home_goals" INTEGER /* Number of goals scored by the home team at half-time */,
  "half_time_away_goals" INTEGER /* Number of goals scored by the away team at half-time */,
  "half_time_result" TEXT /* Half-time result (H for home win, A for away win, D for draw) */,
  "referee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the referee who officiated the match */,
  "home_shots" INTEGER /* Number of shots taken by the home team */,
  "away_shots" INTEGER /* Number of shots taken by the away team */,
  "home_shots_on_target" INTEGER /* Number of shots on target by the home team */,
  "away_shots_on_target" INTEGER /* Number of shots on target by the away team */,
  "home_fouls" INTEGER /* Number of fouls committed by the home team */,
  "away_fouls" INTEGER /* Number of fouls committed by the away team */,
  "home_corners" INTEGER /* Number of corners taken by the home team */,
  "away_corners" INTEGER /* Number of corners taken by the away team */,
  "home_yellow_cards" INTEGER /* Number of yellow cards shown to the home team */,
  "away_yellow_cards" INTEGER /* Number of yellow cards shown to the away team */,
  "home_red_cards" INTEGER /* Number of red cards shown to the home team */,
  "away_red_cards" INTEGER /* Number of red cards shown to the away team */,
  "match_status" TEXT /* Status of the match (e.g., scheduled, in progress, completed) */,
  "match_live" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the match is live or not */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_division_id FOREIGN KEY ("division_id") REFERENCES divisions ("division_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_home_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("home_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_referee_id FOREIGN KEY ("referee_id") REFERENCES referees ("referee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_away_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("away_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "team_abbr" TEXT /* Abbreviation of the team name */,
  "division_id" INTEGER /* ID of the division in which the team plays */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "referees" (
  "referee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each referee */,
  "referee_name" TEXT /* Full name of the referee */,
  "referee_abbr" TEXT /* Abbreviation of the referee's name */,
  "referee_nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the referee */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("referee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bookmakers" (
  "bookmaker_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bookmaker */,
  "bookmaker_name" TEXT /* Name of the bookmaker */,
  "bookmaker_abbr" TEXT /* Abbreviation of the bookmaker's name */,
  "bookmaker_url" TEXT /* URL of the bookmaker's website */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bookmaker_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bets_1x2" (
  "bet_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bet */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match */,
  "bookmaker_id" INTEGER /* ID of the bookmaker */,
  "home_win_odds" REAL /* Odds for a home team win */,
  "draw_odds" REAL /* Odds for a draw */,
  "away_win_odds" REAL /* Odds for an away team win */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bet_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bets_1x2_bookmaker_id FOREIGN KEY ("bookmaker_id") REFERENCES bookmakers ("bookmaker_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bets_1x2_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bets_over_under" (
  "bet_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bet */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match */,
  "bookmaker_id" INTEGER /* ID of the bookmaker */,
  "over_2_5_odds" REAL /* Odds for over 2.5 goals */,
  "under_2_5_odds" REAL /* Odds for under 2.5 goals */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bet_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bets_over_under_bookmaker_id FOREIGN KEY ("bookmaker_id") REFERENCES bookmakers ("bookmaker_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bets_over_under_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bets_asian_handicap" (
  "bet_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bet */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match */,
  "bookmaker_id" INTEGER /* ID of the bookmaker */,
  "handicap" REAL /* Handicap value */,
  "home_win_odds" REAL /* Odds for a home team win */,
  "away_win_odds" REAL /* Odds for an away team win */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bet_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bets_asian_handicap_bookmaker_id FOREIGN KEY ("bookmaker_id") REFERENCES bookmakers ("bookmaker_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bets_asian_handicap_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, manager, analyst, bettor) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "divisions" (
  "division_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each division */,
  "division_name" TEXT /* Name of the division */,
  "division_abbr" TEXT /* Abbreviation of the division name */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("division_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "match_events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of event (e.g., goal, corner, yellow card, red card) */,
  "event_time" TEXT /* Time at which the event occurred */,
  "event_description" TEXT /* Description of the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_match_events_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "match_statistics" (
  "statistic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistic */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match */,
  "statistic_type" TEXT /* Type of statistic (e.g., possession, passes completed, tackles won) */,
  "statistic_value" REAL /* Value of the statistic */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("statistic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_match_statistics_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "betting_odds_history" (
  "odds_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each odds entry */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match */,
  "bookmaker_id" INTEGER /* ID of the bookmaker */,
  "bet_type" TEXT /* Type of bet (e.g., 1X2, over/under, Asian handicap) */,
  "odds" REAL /* Odds value */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp at which the odds were recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("odds_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_betting_odds_history_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_betting_odds_history_bookmaker_id FOREIGN KEY ("bookmaker_id") REFERENCES bookmakers ("bookmaker_id")
)
